summary: Iteration 110 - How It Works page redesign testing complete. All 18 tests passed. Page features hero with gradient headline, 4 visual steps with alternating left/right layouts, scroll-triggered fade-in animations, 7-signal scoring section with 7 cards, score interpretation with 4 color-coded tiers, who it's for/not for sections with check/x lists, UK viability section with 6 factor cards, interactive FAQ accordion (only one open at a time), and CTA section with Start Free and Browse Trending Products buttons. All 4 AI-generated step images load correctly with opaque backgrounds. Navigation works correctly. Homepage and Features page still work.
passed_tests: How It Works page (/how-it-works) loads with hero section
Hero has gradient headline ('From trend signal to launch decision')
4 step sections render (01, 02, 03, 04)
Step 01: Text on LEFT, Image on RIGHT (correct alternating layout)
Step 02: Image on LEFT, Text on RIGHT (correct alternating layout)
Step 03: Text on LEFT, Image on RIGHT (correct alternating layout)
Step 04: Image on LEFT, Text on RIGHT (correct alternating layout)
All 4 step images load correctly (1024x1024px, opaque backgrounds)
Scroll animations work - sections fade in as user scrolls
7-signal scoring section renders with 7 signal cards
Score interpretation section shows 4 color-coded tiers (75-100 Strong, 55-74 Promising, 35-54 Mixed, 0-34 High risk)
Who it's for section renders with 6 check items
Who it's not for section renders with 3 X items
UK viability section renders with 6 factor cards
FAQ accordion works - clicking question toggles answer open/closed
Only one FAQ answer open at a time (clicking another closes previous)
CTA section renders with Start Free and Browse Trending Products buttons
Navigation links work (Features link, How It Works active state)
Homepage still works correctly after changes
Features page (/features) still works correctly
Mobile responsiveness verified (390x844 viewport)
Mobile menu toggle works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: HowItWorksPage.jsx correctly implements alternating layouts using isEven check (idx % 2 === 1)
RevealSection and RevealStagger components from useScrollReveal.js work correctly for scroll animations
FAQ accordion uses React state (openFaq) to ensure only one FAQ is open at a time
All 4 step images use AI-generated URLs from STEP_IMAGES constant with opaque backgrounds
data-testid attributes properly implemented for all testable elements
Page scroll height is 7596px - appropriate for content amount
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 110 verified the redesigned How It Works page. All features working: hero with gradient headline, 4 visual steps with alternating layouts (odd steps: text left/image right, even steps: image left/text right), scroll-triggered animations, 7-signal scoring section, 4 color-coded score tiers, who it's for/not for sections, UK viability with 6 factors, interactive FAQ accordion (only one open at a time), CTA section. All 4 AI-generated images load correctly. Homepage and Features page still work. One 403 console error from external resource (not app-related).
